title: Oil rallies as geopolitical tensions rise
section_path: Oil rallies as geopolitical tensions rise
section_path_text: Oil rallies as geopolitical tensions rise
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Rising geopolitical risks triggered a rerating of the risk premium in energy markets. However, lacklustre demand in China weighed on sentiment elsewhere. Crude oil prices were under pressure early in the session after reports suggest Israel was delaying its ground invasion as the US readied air defence to protect American troops in the region.
